tagline: Alameda and Contra Costa County's Premier Family-Owned Pool Service

hero.headline:
70 Years of Pools Done Right the
First Time
hero.subheadline: Since 1956, Bay Area families have trusted The Pool Doctor to keep their pools pristine, safe, and energy-efficient. With Diamond Certified quality and SSI Certified divers on staff, we handle everything so you just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool & Spa Care From the<br class="hidden md:block"> Bay Area's Most Trusted Team
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to underwater repairs, our technicians bring decades of hands-on expertise to every pool we touch. Customized service schedules, energy-saving upgrades, and the Bay Area's only SSI Certified dive team for pool repairs.

cards.title: Pool Cleaning & Maintenance
cards.description: Customized weekly or bi-weekly service including skimming, vacuuming, chemical balancing, and filter care. Every visit tailored to your pool's specific needs and conditions.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Repairs
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, heaters, filters, valves, and plumbing. Over 120 years of combined team experience means we fix it right the first time.

cards.title: Underwater Dive Repairs
cards.description: SSI Certified divers perform repairs below the waterline without draining your pool. Save thousands in water costs and get back to swimming faster.

cards.title: Energy-Efficient Upgrades
cards.description: Energy Star certified equipment upgrades for pumps, heaters, and filtration. Our clients see up to 90% reduction in pool operating costs.

cards.title: Pool & Spa Automation
cards.description: Automated chemical control and smart pool systems for hands-free water management. Monitor and control your pool from your phone.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Service
cards.description: Specialized service for HOAs, fitness centers, and commercial properties. Full compliance with government regulations and health code requirements.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Evaluation
steps.description: Call us or fill out the form below. We'll inspect your pool, assess its condition, and provide an honest recommendation with transparent pricing — no pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: We Create Your Custom Plan
steps.description: Every pool is different. Our experienced technicians design a service schedule around your pool's unique needs, whether that's weekly maintenance, equipment upgrades, or a one-time repair.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: With 70 years of expertise behind every visit, your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready year-round. Diamond Certified quality means if you're ever not satisfied, we make it right.

about.label: Why Bay Area Families Choose Us
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 1956 — Three Generations of Pool Expertise
about.description: Gary and Kelly Heath carry on a tradition of pool care excellence that began nearly 70 years ago. Our team of seasoned technicians brings over 120 years of combined experience and receives continuous training on the latest products and repair techniques. We're Diamond Certified for 22 consecutive years because we treat every pool like it's our own.

features.title: SSI Certified Dive Team
features.description: Our certified divers perform underwater repairs without draining — saving you time, water, and thousands in refill costs.

features.title: 22 Years Diamond Certified
features.description: Rated highest in quality by the independent Diamond Certified organization every year since 2005. That's trust you can verify.

features.title: Up to 90% Energy Savings
features.description: We specialize in Energy Star certified equipment upgrades that dramatically cut your pool's operating costs while improving performance.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is unique, so we provide custom quotes after a free evaluation. Fair pricing, honest recommendations, and no hidden fees — that's the Pool Doctor way.

guarantee.headline: Our "Diamond Standard" Guarantee
guarantee.description: We've been Diamond Certified for 22 consecutive years because we stand behind every service call. If you're not completely satisfied with any visit, we'll return and make it right at no additional charge. With 70 years of reputation on the line, your satisfaction isn't just a promise — it's our legacy.

faqs.question: How long has The Pool Doctor been in business?
faqs.answer: We were founded in 1956, making us one of the longest-operating pool service companies in the Bay Area. Gary and Kelly Heath continue the tradition of excellence with a team that has over 120 years of combined industry experience.

faqs.question: What does Diamond Certified mean?
faqs.answer: Diamond Certified is an independent rating organization that surveys real customers to identify top-rated companies. The Pool Doctor has earned this distinction for 22 consecutive years — meaning our customers consistently rate us highest in quality and helpful expertise.

faqs.question: Can you repair my pool without draining it?
faqs.answer: Yes! We have SSI Certified divers on staff who perform underwater repairs without draining your pool. This saves you thousands in water costs, avoids potential structural damage from draining, and gets you back to swimming faster.

faqs.question: How much can I save with energy-efficient equipment?
faqs.answer: Our clients typically see up to 90% reduction in pool operating costs after upgrading to Energy Star certified equipment. We'll evaluate your current setup and show you exactly how much you can save with modern pumps, heaters, and filtration systems.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial pools and spas?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We provide specialized commercial pool service for HOAs, fitness centers, apartment communities, and public facilities. Our team is trained in all government regulations and health code requirements to keep your commercial pool compliant and safe.

testimonials.name: Anna T.
testimonials.text: I've been using the Pool Doctor for over 20 years and they have done an excellent job. The consistency and quality of their service is unmatched — I wouldn't trust anyone else with our pool.

testimonials.name: Dennis S.
testimonials.text: Excellent customized service. They explained everything clearly and there was no pressure at all. You can tell they genuinely care about getting it right, not just making a sale.

testimonials.name: Diamond Certified Review
testimonials.text: Not all pool services are equal, but with The Pool Doctor, both the company and technicians are excellent. I have complete confidence in the person who services my pool, and the administrative side is just as professional.

contact.headline:
Ready for Diamond-Certified
Pool Care?
contact.subtitle: Schedule your free pool evaluation today. No pressure, no obligations — just honest advice from a team with 70 years of experience serving the Bay Area.
